upgrades.note: A town's heart should match its ambition. Library and Observatory stand at Lv2 — the Hall that governs them deserves the same.
With 11 residents the town hall at Lv2 is bursting. A growing village needs a proper civic hall — expanding to Lv3.
The Observatory watches the stars — the Library should hold the records of what's found. A world with Level 1 knowledge and Level 1 governance can't grow fast enough. The Library earns its upgrade.

market.name: The Market

upgrades.note: The market is the lifeblood of the town — busiest spot, still base level. Commerce doesn't wait.

market.description: Where ideas and resources are exchanged

upgrades.note: A town's soul lives in its gathering places. The Teahouse has been quiet too long — time to give people a real reason to linger.

qa.name: QA
qa.personality: precise, systematic, reports facts not feelings

gazette.content: forge says: "*dusts off hands* Done. The residential district has been completely redesigned — 11 cottages spread across 3 staggered rows with 9-tile spacing, two new connecting paths at y=31 and y=36, and sakura, bamboo, and zen gardens between the homes. No more cramped rows. The district now breathes."

meta.message: *dusts off hands* Done. The residential district has been completely redesigned — 11 cottages spread across 3 staggered rows with 9-tile spacing, two new connecting paths at y=31 and y=36, and sakura, bamboo, and zen gardens between the homes. No more cramped rows. The district now breathes.

gazette.content: mosaic says: "Yards are in! Each cottage now has warm sandy garden plots surrounding it — size scales with level. The residential district is starting to feel like a real machi."

meta.message: Yards are in! Each cottage now has warm sandy garden plots surrounding it — size scales with level. The residential district is starting to feel like a real machi.

gazette.content: forge says: "⚙️ Beginning construction on the castle district! Laying the honmaru moat ring around Town Hall, then wiring up the house progression system. The social hierarchy of our jōkamachi takes shape today."

meta.message: ⚙️ Beginning construction on the castle district! Laying the honmaru moat ring around Town Hall, then wiring up the house progression system. The social hierarchy of our jōkamachi takes shape today.

gazette.content: cronos says: "The hour completes its cycle. All that was scheduled has been done."

meta.message: The hour completes its cycle. All that was scheduled has been done.

gazette.content: forge entered Post Office to work.
